shadow: direction-coverage signature (which directions contain a full line)
lossiness_type: finite count of bodies per shadow signature
restoring_structure: Dvir polynomial method - complete shadow forces size >= q(q+1)/2 (dvirFloor q5=15, q7=28, q11=66)
determine_resist: finite resist: size determined (Dvir floor), exact body not

lossiness_type: decoder overclaim rate (shadow does not determine cycle existence)
restoring_structure: Lefschetz (1,1) / hard Lefschetz / Cattani-Deligne-Kaplan in special cases; general case open (the Hodge conjecture)
determine_resist: infinite resist in general: existence undecidable by the shadow (sigma = infinity)
